column2: Description
Defines the email template sent to a manager/admin requesting approval to restore an employee's transport rights after a suspension.
Defines the email template notifying an employee that their future schedules have been deleted and/or scheduling rights revoked due to exceeding the No-Show limit.
Defines the email template warning an employee that they are approaching the maximum allowed No-Shows before penalties apply.
Defines the email template notifying an employee that their transport scheduling rights have been successfully restored.
Defines the email template notifying an employee of the Approved/Rejected status of their No-Show enforcement appeal.
Defines the warning email template specifically tied to the monthly No-Show threshold (rather than a rolling date range).
Defines the penalty email template tied to exceeding the monthly No-Show limit.
The warning banner displayed inside the employee app regarding impending month-end No-Show penalties.
Defines the email template notifying an employee that their Evening (Logout) cab was auto-canceled because they didn't show up for their Morning (Login) cab.
The subject line/header for the automatic logout cancellation notification.
The body text for the automatic logout cancellation push notification.
The push notification text sent to an employee when their cab reaches the pickup point (includes driver wait time).
The title/header for the cab arrival push notification.
The subject line reminding an employee to create their commute schedule before the cutoff time.
The body text for the commute schedule reminder notification.
The default header for ad-hoc or "On-demand" cab booking notifications.
The default body text for "On-demand" cab booking notifications.
Error message displayed when an employee tries to set a home address outside the company's approved transport geofence.
Error message displayed when an employee's address exceeds the maximum allowed straight-line (radial) distance from the office.
Error message displayed when the actual driving route distance exceeds the company's allowed limit.
Error message displayed when an employee tries to book a cab to/from a blacklisted zone (e.g., forests, water bodies, unsafe areas).
The subject line for the automated safety alert regarding seatbelt violations.
Defines the warning email template sent to employees flagged by the vehicle's monitoring system for not wearing a seatbelt.
Subject line for the initial warning email that the site's SSO (Single Sign-On) metadata file is expiring soon.
Defines the email template warning IT admins of an impending SSO certificate expiration (prevents login outages).
Subject line for the urgent follow-up warning regarding SSO expiration.
Defines the follow-up email template for SSO expiration.
Defines the default "From" email address (e.g., transport@moveinsync.com) used when broadcasting mass communications.
